$description: Main-page visual contract — Wikipedia-register home page for app-mediakit-knowledge. Token 2: parameterised over tenant; 10 structural slots with leapfrog-2030 extensions. Master co-sign: master@claude-code 2026-05-07T04:55Z. Source spec: project-editorial/.agent/drafts-outbound/design-main-page-token-2.draft.md.

slot.$description: 10-slot anatomy per Wikipedia Main Page baseline. Slots 1–10 in canonical order. Slots are conditionally rendered per tenant config (see state group).

site-banner.$description: Slot 1 — site title + tagline. Per-tenant: site_title + site_tagline from TenantConfig.

lede.$description: Slot 2 — welcome lede. Rendered from index.md body (lede-only pattern). No H1 — title is implied by brand.

featured-article.$description: Slot 3 — framed panel from featured-topic.yaml. Suppressed when file absent. Closer text: '(Full article...)' (Wikipedia muscle-memory register).

recent-additions.$description: Slot 4 — sorted by last_edited descending. Shows 1–5 articles.

portal-grid.$description: Slot 5 — per-tenant category browse grid. Suppressed entirely when tenant categories is empty (flat wikis: corporate, projects).

other-areas.$description: Slot 6 — per-tenant external links (replaces hardcoded GitHub links from Token 1). Defined in TenantConfig.other_areas.

contributing.$description: Slot 7 — minimal Wikipedia-register contribution sentence. Links to /edit/ via contributing_slug from TenantConfig. No marketing copy.

site-footer.$description: Slot 8 — CC BY 4.0 licence notice + trademark line. Hardcoded; does not vary by tenant.

layout.$description: Slot layout, grid dimensions, and responsive breakpoints.

lede-width.$description: Lede panel spans full content column width.

portal-cols-wide.$description: Category portal grid: 3-column layout above breakpoint-3-to-2.

portal-cols-mid.$description: Category portal grid: 2-column layout between breakpoints.

portal-cols-narrow.$description: Category portal grid: 1-column layout below breakpoint-2-to-1.

typography.$description: Type scale assignments for home page slots. Heading levels follow document outline: slot headings = H2, portal card headings = H3.

lede-size.$description: Lede paragraph uses body-lg scale — slightly larger than article body.

stats-banner-size.$description: Stats banner (article count + last-updated date) uses body-sm — factual sub-line, not a headline.

chrome.$description: Surface and border colours for structural home-page elements.

stats-banner-surface.$description: Stats banner sits flush on page surface — no contrast panel.

leapfrog-2030.$description: Five extensions beyond Wikipedia Main Page anatomy. Implementations are gated (see $description per token). Source: §4 of design spec.

json-ld-enabled.$description: Extension 1 (P3) — emit schema:WebSite + schema:ItemList JSON-LD in <head> for main page, featured article, and recent additions. Gate: implement now.

editorial-cadence-signal-enabled.$description: Extension 2 (P3) — surface max(last_edited) across all articles as a sub-line in the stats banner or recent-additions heading. Wikipedia register: plain factual sentence.

editor-as-onramp-enabled.$description: Extension 3 (P3) — Contributing slot includes a direct link to /edit/. Wikipedia register: 'To contribute, see [[contributing-as-engineer]].' No marketing copy.

research-trail-teaser-enabled.$description: Extension 4 (planned) — featured article panel shows citation count footer. Gate: /citations/<slug> route must exist in app-mediakit-knowledge.

citation-graph-stat-enabled.$description: Extension 5 (planned) — stats banner includes total citation count across the encyclopedia. Gate: citations.yaml resolution pass in build pipeline.
